audit_result.proof_trace: When requests fall outside data_column_serve_range, validateDataColumnsByRange returns nil (L198-200), causing the handler to return nil (L72-74) which sends a success response with zero sidecars instead of responseCodeResourceUnavailable as required by the assertion.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker sends DataColumnSidecarsByRangeRequest with startSlot before minValidSlot or after currentSlot. Server responds with success (code 0x00) and empty data instead of ResourceUnavailable (code 0x03), violating P2P spec expectations.

PROP-6a4369e9-pre-008.text: data_column_sidecars_by_range must reject requests outside data_column_serve_range.
PROP-6a4369e9-pre-008.assertion: forall req: req.range outside serve_range => response == ResourceUnavailable
